description: Fresh session test: load checkpoint → feed new doc → verify → checkpoint → reload

3_verify.note: 0% expected — inference only, no gradient updates

interpretation.weights: Carry long-term trained knowledge (100% on docs 0-3)
interpretation.hidden_state: Evolves during forward passes — working memory / session context
interpretation.doc4_zero: Expected: no gradients = no weight updates. h_state changed but weights didn't learn class 4.
interpretation.to_learn_new_doc: Run PyTorch training loop with backprop → re-export → new checkpoint

key_finding: PersistentRNN checkpointing preserves both weights (knowledge) and h_state (context) across session boundaries. Bit-exact round-trip verified.
